nemko.mandatory_requirements_telecom_radio_saf: RadioSafetyEMC(Self-declaration allowed if Effective Use of Spectrum Designated Standard is used and listed, otherwise, UK Type Exam Cert.)
nemko.in_country_test: Life of product(product must comply with Designated Standard listed in UK list during placement of unit on market)
nemko.language_requirements_application_manual: Short-form DoC and warnings in all languages
nemko.local_representation_required_for_approv: Yes - In Country representative must sign the DoC
nemko.approval_validity: Life of product (product must comply with Designated Standard listed in UK list during placement of unit on market)
nemko.factory_inspection: No (unless Full Quality Assurance method used)

standards.standard_specification: ITE UL/CSA 60950-1 CAN/CSA-C22.2 No. 60950-1 IEC/EN 60825 Laser Safety UL/CSA 62368-1, AS/NZS 62368.1, CB to IEC 62368-1 CB with all country deviations and differences IEC 60529 (for IP66, IP67 systems) UL50E Type 4x (on IP66 and IP67 models) ICE UL61010-2-201 CB to IEC 61010-2-201 Hazloc Class 1, Div2/zone2 evaluations UL121201 CSA 22.2 213 UL60079-0, UL60079-7,UL60079-15 EN IEC 60079-0, EN IEC 60079-7, EN IEC 60079-15, EN IEC 60079-28 ATEX certification IECEx certification
CISPR25 UN ECE R10, R118 E-Mark certification
MIL-STD-461 (specific products only upon request) MIL-STD-810 (S&V)
